query: SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, oi.productId, oi.variantId, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.subtotal FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.orderNumber = 'ORD-20260216-YZ0';
